name: Chicken Dressing Casserole
recipeIngredient: 6 oz package of Stove Top herb-flavor biscuit mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Transfer the mixture to a greased 13x9 inch baking dish or pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
4. Let stand for 15 minutes before serving.
5. Yields approximately 8-10 servings.
